title: Character classes should be preferred over reluctant quantifiers in regular expressions
description: Prefer character classes over reluctant quantifiers in regular expressions to improve performance and readability.
message: Avoid using reluctant quantifiers (?!) in regular expressions. Use character classes instead.
recommendation: Use character classes instead of reluctant quantifiers.
why_is_this_an_issue: Reluctant quantifiers can negatively impact performance and readability.
how_to_fix: Replace reluctant quantifiers with character classes.

checks.message: Avoid using reluctant quantifiers (?!) in regular expressions. Use character classes instead.
